violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

Chourice Bread and Ground Beef Pies were observed at 56-59 degrees Fahrenheit. Foods were assessed and placed into refrigeration to blast chill. These items must be under temperature control. Establishment to cease holding any TCS foods at room temperature. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

Reduced oxygen packaged imitation crab meat was observed thawing in the lowboy cooler with the packaging still intact. Product was temped at 34 degrees Fahrenheit. Reduced oxygen packaged/ vacuumed packaged fish products must be removed from packaging prior to thawing under refrigeration or by thawing by submerging under cold running water, (you can keep the product in its packaging during thawing) but you must remove it immediately once thawed. The product temperature during thawing should not exceed 41°F. Fish was fully removed from ROP packaging during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

Grab and go meals packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels with all requirement information. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Items were removed from self service sale during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
Establishment's Rhode Island Food Safety Manager license is expired. FMC must re-instate. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Steak was observed stored in 6 inch hotel pan at 89 degrees Fahrenheit; Food was assessed and placed into container with more surface area and placed into chest freezer to continue cooling process. Cooling guidance provided to employee during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
Drain plug at 3 bay sink observed being used with plastic wrap. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

Allergen advisory statement is not present on menu or at order point. Statement informing customers of their obligation to inform staff of food allergies is required. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025
Establishment's Rhode Island Food Safety Manager license is expired. FMC must re-instate. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2025
Handwashing aids were observed at the food prep sink. Handwashing aids are only to be placed at handwashing sinks. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025
Fly tape was observed hung above food preparation area. PIC informed to cease practice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Pot roast was observed in 6 inch 1/3 hotel pan in reach-in cooler covered with plastic wrap. Food was observed at 89 degrees Fahrenheit. Per staff pot roast cooling time started at 12:30 today. Pot roast was place into shallow food container and placed into freezer to continue cooling process. Cooling guidance provided during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025
Drain plug at 3 bay sink observed being used with plastic wrap. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025
Water at handsink was not dispensable during time of inspection. Handsink did not have faucet handles. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the food prep area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025
